user_message: Just came out of QBR preparation with Fabrikam Residences. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-24 16:29 EST
Subject: Follow-up: QBR preparation Review

Just checking in on the QBR preparation proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-01-07 14:28 EST
Subject: URGENT: QBR preparation Issue at Fabrikam Residences

Just checking in on the QBR preparation proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-L trap (Requiring approval for an obvious milestone update derived from the email create); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-L failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-L failure mode (Requiring approval for an obvious milestone update derived from the email create)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct QBR preparation decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-L -- Requiring approval for an obvious milestone update derived from the email create
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
